author.bio: Talk tech and chill in Lisbon. Join our Barcamp for varying short tech presentations. Want to speak? Show up and tell us about it! Stage's open!
author.name: BarcampLx

content.text:
Who? @hacdias 
What? A quick dive into the dWeb with IPFS
When? 30th of November
Where? @IDEIAhub

Sign up now, it's free! 👉 https://meetup.com/BarcampLx/events/265593046/ 

#BarcampLx #Meetup @YLDio @diconium
